explanation: This command uses the /i flag to import a registry file with an alternate data stream (ADS) named 'stream', which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. The command is formatted with quotes around the file path to simulate safe mutation techniques.
This command is a simplified version of the first, omitting quotes around the file path. It still includes the /i flag and the ADS indicator (':stream'), which are key to triggering the Sigma rule.
This command omits the full path and uses a relative path instead. It still includes the /i flag and the ADS indicator (':stream'), making it a valid test case for the Sigma rule.
